OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: FetchProviderNetworkContracts

childElements.name: LA_MergeHPFAndProviderNetworkRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : true, "advancedMergeMap" : [ { "listKey" : "DE_FetchProviderNetworkContractRecords:providerNetworkRecords", "matchingPath" : "hpfId", "normalizeKey" : "1" }, { "listKey" : "hpfList", "matchingPath" : "Id", "normalizeKey" : "1" } ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "DE_FetchProviderNetworkContractRecords:providerNetworkRecords", "hpfList" ], "filterListFormula" : "", "dynamicOutputFields" : "SV_SetReturnFields:hpfFields", "updateFieldValue" : { "checked" : "=checked" }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DE_FetchProviderNetworkContractRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "recordTypeId" : "=%SV_SetReturnFields:clinicianContractRecordTypeId%", "clinicianId" : "=%contactId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DEFetchProviderNetworkContractRecords", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_SetReturnFields
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "clinicianContractRecordTypeId" : "=QUERY(\"SELECT Id FROM Recordtype WHERE SobjectType = 'contract' and DeveloperName ='Clinician'\")", "hpfFields" : "= \"hpfStatus,contractingStatus,facilityTitle,accountName,accountId,effectiveDate,Id,checked,facilityId\"" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LA_DeselectRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ { "matchingPath" : "hpfId", "normalizeKey" : "1" }, { "matchingPath" : "Id", "normalizeKey" : "1" } ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "hpfList" ], "filterListFormula" : "", "dynamicOutputFields" : "SV_SetReturnFieldsNew:hpfFields", "updateFieldValue" : { "checked" : false }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_SetReturnFieldsNew
